text:
SHORT NAME: TRNSPRTN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: TRNSPRTN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 

341600000X: Ambulance 
3416A0800X: Ambulance — Air Transport 
3416L0300X: Ambulance — Land Transport 
3416S0300X: Ambulance — Water Transport 
341800000X: Military/U.S. Coast Guard Transport
